Home / AI Image Generation Cost Calculator

AI Image Generation Cost Calculator

Compare costs across 7 AI image providers (DALL-E 4/3, Midjourney V7, SD 4, Ideogram 3, Flux Pro, Leonardo AI). Subscription vs API pricing, resolution tiers, bar chart comparison, and volume scenarios.

Scenarios:

How to Use This Tool

1
Select your preferred AI image generation provider from the 7 options.
2
Enter your estimated monthly image generation volume.
3
Choose your target resolution — higher resolutions may use more credits on some platforms.
4
Set the batch size (images per API call) to optimize generation throughput.
5
Pick standard, HD, or ultra quality mode — higher quality multiplies cost by 1.3x-1.8x.
6
Review the bar chart to compare all 7 providers at your volume, and use the comparison table to find the best deal for your needs.

Frequently Asked Questions

Which AI image generator is cheapest in 2026?

Stable Diffusion 4 via API at $0.003/image is by far the cheapest — $3/mo for 1000 images. For subscription-based, Midjourney V7 at $10-120/mo and Leonardo AI at $12-49/mo become the cheapest at higher volumes (200+ images/month). DALL-E 3 ($0.08) and Ideogram 3 ($0.04) are the mid-range per-image options.

Should I pay per image or use a subscription?

For under 100 images/month: pay-per-image (DALL-E 3 or SD 4) is cheapest. For 100-500/month: Midjourney Basic ($10/mo) or Ideogram 3. For 500-2000/month: Midjourney Pro ($30/mo) or Leonardo ($29/mo). For 5,000+/month: Midjourney Mega ($60-120/mo) or self-hosted SD 4. Subscriptions offer unlimited or high-volume relaxed generation.

Which provider is best for text in images?

Ideogram 3 is the undisputed leader for text rendering in images (logos, signs, UI mockups). Flux Pro is excellent for text. DALL-E 4 has significantly improved text accuracy. Midjourney V7 still struggles with longer text strings. For any image requiring readable text, choose Ideogram 3 first.

Can I use AI-generated images commercially?

Yes, for all major platforms. DALL-E (OpenAI) and Midjourney grant full commercial rights to generated images. Stable Diffusion models vary by license — check the specific model. Leonardo AI grants commercial rights on paid plans. Always review the latest terms of service, especially for trademark use.

What resolution should I choose for my use case?

For web/social media: 1024×1024 is sufficient. For print/magazines: 2048×2048 or higher. For widescreen/banners: 1792×1024 (DALL-E). For mobile stories: 1024×1792 (DALL-E). Note: DALL-E 3/4 charge the same for all resolutions, making HD the default choice if quality matters.

How does Midjourney V7 compare to DALL-E 4?

Midjourney V7 produces more aesthetically pleasing, artistic images with superior lighting and composition — preferred by designers and artists. DALL-E 4 excels at following complex, multi-object prompts and renders text more accurately. For creative/artistic work, Midjourney wins. For precise, instruction-following commercial work, DALL-E 4 is better.

What is the best provider for solopreneurs on a budget?

For absolute minimum cost: Stable Diffusion 4 API at $0.003/image (5000 images = $15/mo). For best quality/cost balance: Ideogram 3 at $0.04/image (500 images = $20/mo). For unlimited creative freedom: Midjourney V7 Basic at $10/mo. Most solopreneurs benefit from a combo: Midjourney for creative + Ideogram for text-heavy images.

Results

Example 📅 Data updated: 2026-06-17

🎨 DALL-E 3 Cost Estimate

Quality: Very High | Resolution: 1024×1024 | Batch: 1/gen Pricing: Per-Image $0.080 💰 Cost Summary ────────────────────────────────────────────────── Per Image: $0.08 Monthly Cost (100 images): $8.00 Annual Cost: $96.00 Daily Avg: $0.27 (3 images/day) 🩺 Cost Health: ────────────────────────────────────────────────── • 🟢 Competitive — $0.08/image is at/below market avg ($0.05). • ✅ Per-image is correct for 100 imgs/mo. Break-even: 125 imgs. 📊 All Providers — Monthly Cost at 100 images/mo ────────────────────────────────────────────────── DALL-E 4 ████████████████████████████████ $12.00 ✅ DALL-E 3 ██████████████████████ $8.00 Midjourney V7 (sub) ██████ $10.00/mo SD 4 (API) █ $0.30 Ideogram 3 ███████ $4.00 Flux Pro █████████ $5.00 Leonardo AI (sub) ████████ $12.00/mo ⚖️ Break-Even: When Subscription Beats Per-Image ────────────────────────────────────────────────── DALL-E 4 → Midjourney V7 ($10/mo): 84 imgs/mo break-even DALL-E 4 → Leonardo AI ($12/mo): 100 imgs/mo break-even DALL-E 3 → Midjourney V7 ($10/mo): 125 imgs/mo break-even DALL-E 3 → Leonardo AI ($12/mo): 150 imgs/mo break-even SD 4 (API) → Midjourney V7 ($10/mo): 3,334 imgs/mo break-even SD 4 (API) → Leonardo AI ($12/mo): 4,000 imgs/mo break-even Ideogram 3 → Midjourney V7 ($10/mo): 250 imgs/mo break-even Ideogram 3 → Leonardo AI ($12/mo): 300 imgs/mo break-even Flux Pro → Midjourney V7 ($10/mo): 200 imgs/mo break-even Flux Pro → Leonardo AI ($12/mo): 240 imgs/mo break-even 📈 Volume Scenarios at Different Batch Sizes ────────────────────────────────────────────────── Batch Size | Images/Mo | Cost/Mo | Generations Needed ──────────┼───────────┼────────────┼─────────────────── 1 │ 100 │ $8.00 │ 100 runs of 1 imgs each 4 │ 100 │ $8.00 │ 25 runs of 4 imgs each 8 │ 100 │ $8.00 │ 13 runs of 8 imgs each 16 │ 100 │ $8.00 │ 7 runs of 16 imgs each 32 │ 100 │ $8.00 │ 4 runs of 32 imgs each 💡 Larger batch sizes = fewer API calls. Some providers limit batch to 4-10 images per generation.
